title: Adopt triadic kernel primitives
question: Should the kernel keep task as its only primitive?

chosen.text: Use decision, task, and fact as orthogonal kernel primitives.

rejected.text: Keep task as the only kernel primitive and leave lessons as task-local documents.
rejected.why_not: Lessons have no consuming decision loop and accumulate without changing future choices.

rejected.text: Create a top-level facts directory independent of task provenance.
rejected.why_not: A fact detached from the task that produced it loses the provenance needed to trust it.

claims.text: A decision entity is the missing consumer for durable lessons.

relations.rationale: C1 is supported by the measured finding F-a3f2.
